purpose_context: Phase A built the deterministic recommendation engine in isolation. Phase B turns that engine into visible product value by deriving signals from real analyzer findings, building a safe tool-state map from detected fingerprints and utilization data, calling the frozen Recommend entry point, surfacing a bounded recommendation object in both the free web report and the paid plugin artifact, and respecting the active-tool dedupe and MCP-bloat-prune-first rules the engine already enforces.
purpose_tldr: Wire the deterministic Phase A token-saving recommendation engine into free reports and the paid plugin artifact so users see a bounded, privacy-safe next-best action.
